data.narrative:
Alto Neuroscience is a publicly traded biotech & health company currently valued at $1.04B, having raised $253M to date under founder Amit Etkin. The valuation assessment draws on a peer set of 5 same-sector, similar-valuation-tier comparables spanning both private and public stages, including Recursion Pharmaceuticals ($1.6B public), Freenome ($1.1B public), Chai Discovery ($3.8B Series B), New Limit ($3.1B Series C), and Eikon Therapeutics ($539M Series B).

The peer-median approach is the primary applicable triangulation method, yielding a $1.6B implied valuation. This reflects the median across the 5-company peer set, with a wide range spanning $539M to $3.8B. Public-comp anchoring via price-to-sales multiples could not be applied, as Alto's revenue was not disclosed; the broader Biotech & Health sector median P/S stands at 6.9x across 3 public tickers (RXRX, TEM, ONT.L), but this requires revenue data unavailable here.

The triangulated analysis supports a valuation range of $1.4B to $1.8B, centered on $1.6B. Alto's current $1.04B valuation sits below this median peer comparable by approximately 35 percent. Key uncertainties include the lack of revenue visibility for direct P/S comparison and the wide dispersion across the peer set—a $3.2B gap between minimum and maximum—which reflects material differences in development stage and risk profile across the comparables.
